zh: 具備 3 年以上 SoC 韌體開發經驗，專精於 C 語言、ARM 架構及高速介面協議（PCIe）。擅長設計 Low-level Driver、HAL 以及軟硬體整合，具備深厚的底層除錯實力，並能熟練運用 Protocol Analyzer 診斷複雜的鏈路穩定性與系統相容性問題。於職涯轉銜期間，持續透過 LeetCode 強化資料結構與演算法邏輯，並積極運用 AI 技術加速新技能學習與 Side Project 實作。目前尋求韌體及嵌入式開發職位，期許能發揮在高效能即時系統開發中的嚴謹邏輯，結合多元的技術視野協助團隊優化研發效率。
en: With over 3 years of experience in SoC firmware development, I specialize in C programming, ARM architectures, and high-speed interface protocols (PCIe). I am adept at designing Low-level Drivers, HAL, and managing hardware-software integration. I possess robust low-level debugging skills and am proficient in using Protocol Analyzers to diagnose complex link stability and system compatibility issues.During my career transition, I have consistently strengthened my data structures and algorithms logic through LeetCode, while actively leveraging AI technologies to accelerate the learning of new skills and the implementation of side projects. Currently, I am seeking a firmware or embedded development position where I can apply the rigorous logic gained from high-performance real-time system development and my diverse technical perspective to enhance team R&D efficiency.

title.zh: SSD 韌體工程師 - 群聯電子
title.en: SSD Firmware Engineer - Phison Electronics Corp

zh.main: 開發全球首款 DRAM-less PCIe/NVMe Gen5 SSD — Phison E31 韌體架構。
sub: 開發 E31 Gen5 SSD controller 的 PCIe initialization flow，處理軟硬整合使 link 可以達到 Gen5 並且維持穩定。
基於客戶需求，設計與實作客製化的 host 端 firmware features。
優化 low-level system sequences，例如 power-on and reset latencies 等等，來滿足 OEM 效能需求。

zh: 專精於 ARM Cortex-R 架構下的 SSD 韌體開發，具備豐富的 Low-level Driver 與 HAL 設計經驗，包含 Register-level programming、interrupt handling、memory management、power management 及 DMA 。
專精於 PCIe 和 NVMe 並且使用 Protocol Analyzer (Viavi, LeCroy) 來解決 host 端跨平台的相容性問題以及鏈路問題。
設計 UEFI/Shell scripts 做 SoC verification，並透過 drivelog analysis、code tracing、logic analyzer、JTAG、Keil、GPIO 以及 UART 等技術來做 firmware debugging。
有經驗於跨部門合作以及出差至客戶端 on-site 支援。

en.main: Developed the firmware architecture for the world’s first DRAM-less Gen5 NVMe SSD (Phison E31).
sub: Developed the PCIe initialization flow for the E31 Gen5 SSD controller, ensuring seamless hardware-software integration and achieving stable Gen5 link performance.
Designed and implemented customized host-side firmware features based on customer requirements.
Optimized low-level system sequences, including power-on and reset latencies, to improve system responsiveness and meet stringent OEM performance requirements.

en: Specialized in ARM Cortex-R based SSD firmware development with expertise in Low-level Drivers and HAL design, covering register-level programming, interrupt handling, memory management, power management, and DMA optimization.
Proficient in PCIe and NVMe and resolved host-side compatibility issues and link issues across various platforms by using Protocol Analyzer (Viavi, LeCroy).

Designed UEFI/Shell scripts for SoC verification and performed firmware debugging through drive log analysis, code tracing, and the utilization of logic analyzers, JTAG, Keil, GPIO, and UART techniques.
Collaborated cross-functionally and delivered on-site technical support at client locations.

title.zh: 國立臺灣大學 (NTU) - 工程科學與海洋工程研究所 碩士
title.en: National Taiwan University (NTU) - Master of Engineering

zh: 實驗室：計算生醫工程實驗室
論文：結合紋理特徵之多視角殘差選擇核網路應用於肺結節分類
en: Thesis: Multiview residual selective kernel networks for lung nodule classification associated with texture features.

zh: 提出新的 AI 模型架構，並結合紋理特徵，來優化肺結節分類的準確度。
en: Proposed a novel AI model architecture integrating texture feature extraction to optimize lung nodule classification accuracy.

schools.stack: Tech Stack: Python, Pytorch, MATLAB, Deep Learning, Image Processing, Image Classification

title.zh: 國立臺灣師範大學 (NTNU) - 地球科學系 學士
title.en: National Taiwan Normal University (NTNU) - Bachelor of Science

title.zh: 開發平台 & 嵌入式系統
FUSE 使用者空間檔案系統實作

desc.zh: 這是一個使用 C++17 與 libfuse3 實作的專案，旨在模擬類 Unix 檔案系統的底層運作機制。專案透過 pread/pwrite 在單一映像檔上建立磁碟佈局，包含實作 Superblock、Inode Table 與 Bitmap 資源管理，支援基礎的檔案建立、讀寫、刪除及持久化儲存。開發過程中重點處理了多執行緒環境下的資料一致性保護與 POSIX 錯誤代碼回傳，並透過實作 mkfs 工具完成格式化流程，藉此深化對作業系統檔案系統架構與區塊設備操作的理解。
desc.en: This is a project implemented with C++17 and libfuse3 aimed at simulating the underlying mechanisms of a Unix-like file system. By using pread/pwrite to establish a disk layout on a single image file, the project implements Superblock, Inode Table, and Bitmap resource management, supporting basic file creation, read/write, deletion, and persistent storage. The development focused on ensuring data consistency in a multi-threaded environment and handling POSIX error codes, while a custom mkfs tool was developed for the formatting process to deepen the understanding of operating system file system architecture and block device operations.

items.stack: Tech Stack: C++17, C, Bash, FUSE (libfuse3), POSIX API

desc.zh: 本專案實作從底層 GPS 數據採集至前端地圖視覺化的完整流程 。透過 Arduino 整合 NEO-6M 模組擷取即時座標，並利用 Python 搭配 Google Cloud Pub/Sub 實現 TLS 加密傳輸以確保資安。後端於 GCE 部署 MySQL 儲存資料，並開發 PHP 介面作為數據交換橋樑，串接 Google Maps API 達成即時點位更新。
desc.en: Implemented a complete pipeline from low-level GPS data acquisition to front-end map visualization. Integrated Arduino with the NEO-6M module to capture real-time coordinates, utilizing Python and Google Cloud Pub/Sub to achieve TLS-encrypted transmission for enhanced security. Deployed a MySQL database on GCE for storage and developed a PHP interface as a data exchange bridge, integrating the Google Maps API for real-time location updates.

items.stack: Tech Stack: C++, Arduino, Python, SQL, PHP, Google Cloud Platform (Pub/Sub, GCE), MySQL, Google Maps API, WireShark

desc.zh: 開發一個採用資料驅動架構的履歷網站，先包成 Docker image，再使用 Terraform 與 Kubernetes 部署於 Hetzner Cloud，並透過 GitHub Actions 實現全自動化的 CI/CD 流程。
desc.en: Developed a data-driven resume website, packaged it into a Docker image, deployed it to Hetzner Cloud using Terraform and Kubernetes, and implemented a fully automated CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions.

items.stack: Tech Stack: Docker, Terraform, K8s, Hetzner, GitHub Actions, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

title.zh: 每日 AI 自動化財經新聞電子報

desc.zh: 開發全自動化的雲原生系統，利用 Docker 和 AWS 協調網路爬蟲、AI 驅動的新聞摘要和音訊生成，利用 n8n 工作流程透過電子郵件發送最終報告和 Podcast。
desc.en: Developed a fully automated cloud-native system utilizing Docker and AWS to orchestrate web scraping, AI-driven financial news summarization, and audio generation, leveraging n8n workflows for delivery via email.

items.stack: Tech Stack: Python, Selenium, BeautifulSoup, Requests, AWS, Docker, n8n, Google Gemini API, Azure AI Speech API
